content.query:
create view v_PaidInvoicesSMG_Visual
-- drop view v_PaidInvoicesSMG_Visual
as
SELECT			A.INVOICE_ID, A.CUSTOMER_ID, A.LAST_PAID_DATE, ROUND(InvAmt2/NULLIF(count(LINE_NO) OVER (PARTITION BY CUST_ORDER_ID),0),2) as InvAmt
,               B.CUST_ORDER_ID, LINE_NO 
FROM
(
SELECT			INVOICE_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, MAX(LAST_PAID_DATE) AS LAST_PAID_DATE, SUM(TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT) AS InvAmt2
FROM			ECV.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE
WHERE			LAST_PAID_DATE >= '2023-01-01'
AND				CUSTOMER_ID IN
(
'BES000',
'BR7181',
'HA3125',
'HD1000',
'HOM003',
'HO3000',
'LO4003',
'HA8170',
'E336555',
'Y336555',
'LT5501',
'WA0781',
'CS8100',
'E834730',
'WA1001'
)
GROUP BY		INVOICE_ID, CUSTOMER_ID
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			DISTINCT INVOICE_ID, CUST_ORDER_ID, LINE_NO 
from			ECV.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE_LINE
) B				ON A.INVOICE_ID = B.INVOICE_ID
